account_inactive: Your account is inactive. Contact your administrator.
arweave_retry: Couldn't anchor the permanent evidence. Retrying.
auth_not_configured: The authentication system is not configured. Contact your administrator.
auth_sync_failed: Could not synchronize with the authentication service. Please retry.
cert_exists: A valid certificate already exists for this cycle.
cert_not_found: No certificate exists with that identifier.
cert_not_revocable: This certificate cannot be revoked in its current state.
certification_in_progress: A certification is in progress for this plot. Try again in a few minutes.
crop_mismatch: All parcels in the shipment must be of the same crop.
insufficient_funds: Insufficient funds in the treasury. Deposit USDC to continue.
invalid_polygon: The polygon is not valid: check that its vertices do not cross.
irys_low: The permanent storage balance is low. Fund it or certifications will fail.
last_team_admin: The unit cannot be left without administration. Assign the privilege to another member first.
no_access_section: You don't have access to this section.
no_active_cycle: A parcel has no active planting cycle.
no_privilege: Your role doesn't allow this action. Request it from an administrator of your unit.
not_found: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
parcel_anomaly: A parcel has an anomaly and cannot be certified.
planting_duplicate: You already declared a planting recently. Contact your operator if this was a mistake.
privilege_deprecated: That privilege is deprecated and can no longer be assigned to new sub-roles.
privilege_exists: A privilege with that key already exists.
privilege_key_invalid: The key must look like domain.action (lowercase).
rate_limited: Too many requests. Try again in a moment.
sensor_coverage: This parcel requires {{n}} sensors for its area.
sentinel_down: The satellite provider connection is down. Certifications will pause.
server: Something went wrong on our side. Try again in a few minutes.
session_expired: Your session expired. Sign in again.
subrole_exists: A sub-role with that name already exists.
subrole_in_use: This sub-role is assigned to members. Reassign them before deleting it.
timeout: The operation took too long. Retry.
unit_not_active: The unit is suspended or pending on-chain: it cannot issue certificates.
user_exists: An account with this email already exists.
wrong_surface: This account uses the farmer app.
